name: Annehem Fastigheter AB
summary: Annehem Fastigheter AB operates as a real estate company. The company owns and manages commercial, community, and residential properties in Stockholm, Sk√É¬•ne, and Gothenburg, Sweden; Helsinki, Finland; and Oslo, Norway. It property portfolio consists of 22 investment properties with a lettable area of 184,000 square meters. The company is based in Solna, Sweden.
